documentation.description:
| Purpose
| Command_Symbols contains the command name table used by the body of
| package Command.  It also contains the error messages issued by
| routines within the package.
|
| Initialization Exceptions (none)
| Notes (none)
|
| Modifications
| 08/16/89  Rick Conn    Initial Version
| 02/26/90  Rick Conn    Added .du, .eu commands

simple_types.name: COMMAND_ID
simple_types.code:
type COMMAND_ID is
  (UNKNOWN,
   AUTO_PARAGRAPH,
   BOLD,
   BREAK,
   CENTER,
   COMMENT,
   CONSOLE_MESSAGE,
   CONTENTS_SELECT,
   …,
   WRITE);

array_types.name: COMMAND_LIST
array_types.code: type COMMAND_LIST is array (NATURAL range <>) of COMMAND_DEFINITION;

record_types.name: COMMAND_DEFINITION

constants.name: Command_Text_Length
constants.code: Command_Text_Length : constant := 12;
